---
name: Real-world feedback
about: Share what you tried with SAM — what worked, what didn't, what's missing
title: "[feedback] "
labels: ["feedback", "real-world"]
---

<!--
This is the most valuable issue type at v0. Feedback from real authoring or consumption shapes the roadmap.
-->

## Your role

What were you trying to do?

- [ ] **Author** a SAM for software you produce
- [ ] **Consume** a SAM as part of a procurement / security / SRE / build review
- [ ] **Audit** SAMs for regulatory or compliance purposes
- [ ] **Build tooling** (validator, signer, viewer, generator)
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Context (optional, but helps a lot)

What kind of software / what scale / what regulatory environment? Anything that would help us understand whether your feedback generalizes or is specific to your situation.

## What worked

What about SAM was helpful, clear, or a good fit for what you were doing?

## What didn't

What was confusing, missing, awkward, or wrong? Where did you get stuck? What did you have to guess at? Specific examples (sections of the spec, schema fields) help.

## Suggestions

What would have made this easier? Optional — sometimes naming the gap is enough.

## Additional context

Screenshots, linked manifests (if shareable), prior tools you compared SAM to, etc.
